assumption_text: Subtract the 45,000 in-city ABiH troop figure from the 340,000 inhabitants figure when constructing civilian exposure.
rationale: This avoids double-counting troops inside a citywide inhabitants total.

assumption_text: Hold Sarajevo population and troop figures constant across the indictment-period window.
rationale: No better month-by-month force/population series was retained in this retrofit wave.

assumption_text: Use the documented March 1994 East Mostar Muslim population (~27,700) as the civilian exposure proxy for the siege row.
rationale: This is more defensible than using the wider enclave maximum or the whole municipality.

assumption_text: Round the civilian/combatant split derived from 49.5% / 50.5% of 539 total deaths to 267 / 272.
rationale: The source provides proportions rather than explicit integer counts in the retained accessible summary.

assumption_text: Keep the Srebrenica execution victims in unknown-status for DR purposes.
rationale: The retained source clearly identifies Bosnian Muslim men and boys as victims but does not fully classify them as civilians versus combatants.

assumption_text: Do not convert the Prijedor killed-or-missing total into direct deaths.
rationale: Project rules prohibit forcing mixed killed/missing aggregates into the direct-death baseline.
